Background.social_class: Working Class (First-generation professional with high debt-to-income ratio)
Background.key_experience: Watching his father lose his pension after thirty years because of a legal loophole in a merger, which taught him that loyalty is a variable and only logic-backed contracts provide security.

Cognition.bias: The Objectivity Illusion (the belief that his own perspective is free from bias because it is based on data, leading him to dismiss others' emotional experiences as noise)

Current_State.recent_memory: Calculated the exact depreciation of his car over the last 10,000 miles while waiting for a lukewarm coffee at a gas station.
